title: DOL announces new system for electronic filings of appeals
description_html:
DOL announced that it is launching a new eFile/eServe System (EFS) on December 7, 2020 for electronic filings in proceedings before the Administrative Review Board (ARB), Benefits Review Board (BRB), Employee Compensation Appeals Board (ECAB), Office of Administrative Law Judges (OALJ), and Board of Alien Labor Certification Appeals (BALCA).

[ID #1157]
